title: ASR Outdoor Illuminated Dry Box Detachable Lid Large Waterproof Storage Case
description:
The ASR Outdoor waterproof dry box is a great option for storing tools, essential items, and accessories that need to be kept dry in an emergency or inclement weather. Use it to hold phones, batteries, emergency supplies, and other items and store them safely in your car or boat. Each dry box comes with a removable COB light and lid that are both detachable so you can locate your items in the dark easily if needed. The light requires 3 AAA batteries which we’ve included for convenience. The ASR Outdoor storage case is made of durable, high-quality plastic with a steel latch that won’t rust or deteriorate. It comes in a classic black color and features a secure latch that makes the box airtight once locked. Our dry box comes in a large size (11.4” x 5.1” x 7

ASR Outdoor Illuminated Dry Box Detachable Lid Large Waterproof Storage Case

The ASR Outdoor waterproof dry box is a great option for storing tools, essential items, and accessories that need to be kept dry in an emergency or inclement weather. Use it to hold phones, batteries, emergency supplies, and other items and store them safely in your car or boat.

Key Features

  • WATERPROOF STORAGE BOX - ASR Outdoor waterproof dry box is ideal for storing tools, accessories, and essential items that need to be kept dry in inclement weather or emergency situations. Use it to hold emergency supplies, phones, batteries, and other items; store them in your car, kayak, or boat safely
  • ILLUMINATED DETACHABLE LID - Dry box comes with a removable COB light and lid that are detachable so you can locate your items in the dark. Light requires 3AAA batteries (included)
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Waterproof storage case is made of high-quality, durable plastic that won’t rust or deteriorate. Comes in black color and features a secure latch lid that makes the box airtight once locked
  • LARGE SIZE - Dry box measures 11.4” x 5.1” x 7.5”, the ideal size for holding larger tools and supplies without taking up too much space. Store emergency hammer, flashlights, blankets, blades, and more in case of emergency
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plastic, metal (waterproof); Colors: Black, chrome; Dimensions: 11.4” x 5.1” x 7.5”; Lid type: detachable; Light included: COB, detachable; Batteries Included: 3AAA

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DRBXBLK1L
  • UPC: 810058484314
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Large

Each dry box comes with a removable COB light and lid that are both detachable so you can locate your items in the dark easily if needed. The light requires 3 AAA batteries which we’ve included for convenience.

The ASR Outdoor storage case is made of durable, high-quality plastic with a steel latch that won’t rust or deteriorate. It comes in a classic black color and features a secure latch that makes the box airtight once locked.

Our dry box comes in a large size (11.4” x 5.1” x 7.5”) that is ideal for holding larger tools and supplies without taking up too much space in your car, boat, or workshop. Easily store items like emergency hammers, flashlights, blankets, and more in case of an emergency!
